situation.intent: Assess fire risk
assess tree and forest health
check vehicle for damage or misfunction
situation.roleplayDescription: Character stopped as he/she discovered a strange sound coming from the vehicle.

situation.intent: do a small workout
Drescher auftanken
Drescher Staub ausblasen
engage with logging contractors
Fertilizing first stage after sowing with manure
Fertilizing first stage after sowing with slurry
Fertilizing first stage before sowing with manure
Fertilizing first stage before sowing with slurry

Güllefass abschmieren, Öl nachfüllen und Gestänge einstellen

have a picnic
Inspect campfires and barbecue spots, enforce fire regulations
mark trees for thinning or harvest
measure and record trees
meet local residents to discuss town development
Meets with the local energy company to review the expansion of the district heating network at the location.
meets with the telecommunication Company to review the expansion of the fiber optic network at the location
monitor wildlife and habitats
park at the shop now and want to buy some daily goods
park the car at the machinery dealer to aquire information about new machinery
park the car at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the car
park the combine at the workshop / machine dealer for the inspection and maintenance of the combine during harvest
park the combine at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the combine
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the cultivator
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the disc harrow
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the fertilizer spreader
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the manure spreader
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the plow
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the seeder
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the slurry tank
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the tractor
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the trailer
park the tractor at the workshop to request a modification, inspection or repair of the weed sprayer
plan timber harvests
play with the kids
Plow dead crops
prepare the harvester / combine for upcoming grain harvest
prepare the tractor for the day
pull over for a phone call
pull over to check something on the phone
pull over to check the trailer connection
putting up posters for the next mayoral election
read a book
relax at home
relax with friends

Seed: Barley

visit player to exchange tips about farm and vehicle winter preparation

situation.intent: Visits player to exchange tips regarding the upcoming sowing and cultivation plan
